title: asplenium raoulii var. minus
intro: Asplenium raoulii var. minus, also known as a variety of the Raoulii fern, is a type of rare, epiphytic fern native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Asplenium raoulii var. minus include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In traditional Maori medicine, Asplenium raoulii var. minus is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in poultices and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
